questions.text: The sum of angles of a quadrilateral is:
questions.explanation: The sum of all interior angles of any quadrilateral is 360°. This can be proved by dividing it into two triangles.

questions.text: Diagonals of a parallelogram bisect each other.
questions.explanation: In a parallelogram, the diagonals bisect each other (cut each other into two equal parts).

questions.correctAnswer: A quadrilateral with both pairs of opposite sides parallel.
questions.explanation: A parallelogram has opposite sides parallel and equal. Opposite angles are also equal.

questions.text: A quadrilateral with all sides equal is called a ________.
questions.explanation: A rhombus is a quadrilateral with all four sides equal. Its diagonals bisect each other at right angles.
